# OWNER

**Enumeration Case**

The owner of the shared record who can add private users but not add public users.

## Declaration

```swift
const String OWNER;
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **PRIVATE_USER**: Participants who were invited to share the record by the owner.
- **PUBLIC_USER**: Participants who accepted a shared record by accessing the share URL.
- **UNKNOWN**: Unknown type of participant.
